params.name: St. Patrick's Shamrock
params.description:
On Aug 21, 432 AD, Saint Patrick picked this shamrock to explain the doctrine to the Irish people.
Saint Patrick came to Ireland to convert the locals to Catholicism under the Pope's instruction. However, he faced hostility from many residents who planned to harm him. In a crisis, Saint Patrick used a shamrock to explain the doctrine of the Trinity, successfully converting them. This clover became one of his symbols and was cherished by many.
params.skill1: [[File:Prairiesanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
